incident: SMTP relay connection timeout to downstream MTA -> connection refused -> deferred queue overflow -> messages bounced, amid recurring hostname-verification-failed distractors

ground_truth.desc: Queue starting to back up before connection failure

ground_truth.needle: smtp connection to smtp.example.com[10.0.3.10]:25 refused: connection refused

ground_truth.desc: Messages deferred due to refused connections

ground_truth.needle: status=bounced (too many hops: deferred queue full)
ground_truth.desc: Messages bounced because deferred queue was full
